name: Revolut
benefit_user: Get ₹500 welcome bonus when you order a physical card and make 3 purchases.
benefit_owner: I get ₹1000 when you complete the steps.
steps: Click the referral link and download the Revolut app.
Verify your identity (KYC).
Add money to your account.
Order a physical debit card.
Make 3 separate purchases of at least ₹100 each.

faq.question: How long does it take to get the bonus?
faq.answer: The bonus is usually credited within 3-5 days after completing all required steps.

faq.question: Do I need to pay for the physical card?
faq.answer: Yes, standard delivery fees may apply depending on your region, but the bonus covers it.

name: CRED
benefit_user: Get up to ₹250 cashback on your first credit card bill payment.
steps: Download CRED using the link.
Apply with your mobile number to check credit score.
Add a credit card and make a bill payment of minimum ₹1000.

faq.question: What is the minimum bill payment amount?
faq.answer: You need to pay a minimum of ₹1000 on your first bill payment.

name: Fi Money
benefit_user: Get ₹200 added to your new account.
benefit_owner: I get ₹200 added to my account.
steps: Download the Fi app and sign up.
Enter the referral code HUSS123 during signup.
Add a minimum of ₹3000 to your account within 7 days.

faq.question: Can I withdraw the ₹3000 immediately?
faq.answer: Yes, but it's recommended to keep it for a few days until the bonus is credited.

name: Airbnb
benefit_user: Save up to $65 on your first qualifying booking.
steps: Click the link to sign up for a new Airbnb account.
Book a stay of $100 or more.
The discount will automatically apply at checkout.

faq.question: Is the credit valid for experiences?
faq.answer: Yes, $15 out of the $65 credit can be used for Airbnb Experiences.

name: Uber
benefit_user: Get 50% off your first 3 rides (up to $10 each).
benefit_owner: I get $10 off my next ride.
steps: Download the Uber app.
Enter the code 'uberHUSS' in the promotions section before booking.
Take your first 3 rides.

faq.question: Does this work in all cities?
faq.answer: It depends on the city. The value may vary slightly by local currency.

name: Amazon Prime
benefit_owner: I receive a $5 Amazon gift card.
steps: Click the referral link.
Sign up for the Prime 30-day trial.
Link a valid credit card.

faq.question: Can I cancel before the trial ends?
faq.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime before 30 days and you won't be charged.

name: Dropbox
benefit_user: Get 500 MB of extra bonus space.
benefit_owner: I get 500 MB of extra bonus space.
steps: Click the link to create a new Dropbox account.
Install the Dropbox desktop app.
Sign in from the desktop app.

faq.question: Is the bonus space permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, the 500 MB bonus space is permanent.

name: Notion
steps: Sign up for a Notion account using the link.
Use the product on Web, Mac, or Windows.

faq.question: What can I use the credit for?
faq.answer: The credit can be used to pay for premium plans like Notion Plus or AI.

name: Binance
benefit_user: Get 10% off trading fees for life and a $100 welcome bonus.
benefit_owner: I get 10% commission on your trades.
steps: Create an account using the link.
Complete Identity Verification within 14 days.
Make a first deposit of $50 or more.

faq.question: Is the fee discount permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, you will get 10% off your spot trading fees for life.

name: DoorDash
benefit_user: Get $15 off your first 3 orders ($5 off each).
steps: Sign up using the link.
Place your first order with a subtotal of $15 or more.
The $5 discount will automatically apply.

faq.question: Can I use this with other promotions?
faq.answer: Usually, sign-up bonuses cannot be stacked with other active promotions.
